title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Asian Paints Signature Store - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Asian Paints Signature Store are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Visakhapatnam. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Asian Paints Signature Store:
Asian Paints Signature Store is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store!
